storyHook: 下载安装，注册使用，学会基本操作

narrative.when: 周三晚上，朋友推荐了一个新软件
narrative.who: 甲（新用户）· 乙（推荐软件的朋友，电话指导）
narrative.how: 下载安装后跟着朋友的指导操作
narrative.method: 下载安装、注册账户、学习基本按钮、完成第一个任务
narrative.event: 甲想用这个软件管理这周的工作安排

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I have the thing on my hand now.
turns.zh: 我现在手上有这个工具了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good, open it and see what you get.
turns.zh: 好，打开看看有什么。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is asking for my name on the net and a secret word.
turns.zh: 它问我要网上的名字和一个秘密词。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Put your net name first, then make a secret word.
turns.zh: 先输入你的网络名称，再设一个密码。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. It is asking for my account name.
turns.zh: 好了。它在问我的账户名字。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Use your first name, that is good.
turns.zh: 用你的名字就行。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see a button for a new work.
turns.zh: 我看到一个新建工作的按钮。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Give it a name and a day.
turns.zh: 给它一个名字和一个日子。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I put 'work list' for tomorrow.
turns.zh: 我写了'工作清单'，截止明天。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Well done. You have your first bit of work on the list.
turns.zh: 做得好。列表里有了第一个任务。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see a button with days. What is that for?
turns.zh: 我看到一个带日期的按钮，那是干嘛的？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: It puts your work day by day. Give it a push.
turns.zh: 它按天列出你的工作，按一下。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, it is all in colored squares. That is clear.
turns.zh: 哦，全是彩色方块，很清楚。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now go back and make a note for the day after.
turns.zh: 现在回去，给后天也记一个。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will put 'meeting' for the day after the second day.
turns.zh: 好，我写个‘会议’在第二天之后那天。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Now put a time on that meeting.
turns.zh: 现在给那个会议加个时间。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I put it at ten in the morning.
turns.zh: 我设成早上十点。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now see if you can make it give you a note before.
turns.zh: 好。现在试试能不能让它提前提醒你。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I see a bell sign. I will give it a push.
turns.zh: 我看到一个铃铛图标，点了一下。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the note bell. Put it for one day before.
turns.zh: 那就是提醒铃。设成提前一天。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. It says 'note in one day'.
turns.zh: 好了，显示‘一天后提醒’。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You are getting the way of it. Now go to the list view.
turns.zh: 你开始上手了。现在去列表视图。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Where is that? I only see the day view.
turns.zh: 在哪？我只看到日视图。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Look at the top. There is a button with lines.
turns.zh: 看顶部，有个带线条的按钮。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I see it. I will give it a push.
turns.zh: 嗯，看到了。我点一下。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now you see all your work in a list.
turns.zh: 好。现在你看到所有工作列表了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is much clearer. What is the circle on the left?
turns.zh: 清楚多了。左边那个圆圈是什么？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is to mark it done. Give it a push on the first one.
turns.zh: 那是标记完成的。点一下第一个任务。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. There, it has a line through it now.
turns.zh: 我点一下。好了，现在它被划掉了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. That is done. How are you?
turns.zh: 对。做完了。你怎么样？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Quite good. I may do the rest this week.
turns.zh: 挺不错的。这周剩下的我可能也能搞定。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: You will. Now make a new one for tomorrow.
turns.zh: 你会的。现在为明天新建一个任务。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do I do the same steps?
turns.zh: 我要按同样的步骤来吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. Put my name, then make it tomorrow.
turns.zh: 对。写我的名字，然后设成明天。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. It is on the list for tomorrow.
turns.zh: 好了。它出现在明天的列表里了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Right. Now see the bell sign at the top?
turns.zh: 对。看到顶上的铃铛图标了吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, I see it. What is that for?
turns.zh: 看到了。那是干嘛的？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is for a note. Push it to get a note before the time.
turns.zh: 那是提醒用的。点一下就能提前收到通知。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will give it a push. There, it says 'a day before'.
turns.zh: 我点一下。好了，它写着“提前一天”。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now you have two things on your list.
turns.zh: 好。现在你的列表上有两个任务了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What about the other button with a square?
turns.zh: 那个带方块的按钮是干嘛的？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the list of days. Push it to see your time.
turns.zh: 那是日期表。点一下就能看到你的时间。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Oh, I see little bits of color on it.
turns.zh: 哦，我看到上面有彩色小块。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, every shade is for a different thing.
turns.zh: 对，每种颜色代表不同的事情。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Can I put this thing on another day?
turns.zh: 我能把这个东西放到另一天吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, put your finger on it and pull it.
turns.zh: 可以，用手指按住它然后拖动。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is simple. I will do that now.
turns.zh: 挺简单的。我现在就试试。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now you have the idea of how it works.
turns.zh: 好。现在你明白它怎么用了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Let us make one more thing for this week?
turns.zh: 我们要不要再给这周加个任务？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. Put 'get food' for the day before the rest day.
turns.zh: 好。写个“买吃的”在休息日之前那天。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. What day is the rest day?
turns.zh: 对。休息日是星期几？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: The last day of the week is the day of rest.
turns.zh: 一周的最后一天是休息日。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: So I put 'get food' on the day after that?
turns.zh: 那我把它放在那天之后？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, that is a good idea.
turns.zh: 对，这主意不错。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will do that now. Done.
turns.zh: 我现在就做。好了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Now you have the third thing on your list.
turns.zh: 好的。现在列表里有第三项了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: What about a note for the time?
turns.zh: 要不要加个时间备注？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Put a time under the day.
turns.zh: 在日期下面加个时间。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will put 'ten in the morning' for the first thing.
turns.zh: 我在第一项下面写“上午十点”。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a good start. You are getting the idea.
turns.zh: 这是个好的开始。你慢慢明白了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right, now have a look at the time list.
turns.zh: 好，现在看看时间列表。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see it. The things are colored bits.
turns.zh: 我看到了。这些是彩色小块。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. That makes your week clear.
turns.zh: 对。这样一周的安排就清楚了。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Can I make a note on a day?
turns.zh: 我能在某天加个备注吗？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, put your finger on the day and a note box comes up.
turns.zh: 可以，点一下那天就会弹出备注框。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will put 'meeting at three' two days from now.
turns.zh: 我将在后天写上“三点开会”。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Let us make a note for that.
turns.zh: 好。我们来记个那个。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see a note at the lower part. One day before?
turns.zh: 我看到下面有个提示。提前一天？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes, that is good. Touch it.
turns.zh: 对，那样就行。点它。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Done. It says 'note is fixed'.
turns.zh: 好了。显示‘备忘已定’。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now let us see the week view.
turns.zh: 现在我们看看周视图。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will put my finger on the top right.
turns.zh: 我点一下右上角。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good, that gives you all seven days.
turns.zh: 好，这样就能看到七天。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see my note on the third day.
turns.zh: 我看到第三天的备注了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: You may put a thing on another day.
turns.zh: 你可以把一件事放到另一天。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: How do I do that?
turns.zh: 怎么操作？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Put your finger on the work and pull it.
turns.zh: 按住这个任务，然后拖动它。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will have a go now.
turns.zh: 我现在试试。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Did it go to the new day?
turns.zh: 它到新的一天了吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, it is there. That is simple.
turns.zh: 是的，它在那里。很简单。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now put a bell on it for the day before.
turns.zh: 现在给它设个提醒，提前一天。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: A bell? Where is that?
turns.zh: 提醒？在哪里设置？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Open the work and look for 'bell'.
turns.zh: 打开这个任务，找‘提醒’选项。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I see it. I will put the bell on.
turns.zh: 看到了，我打开提醒。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. Now go back to the first page.
turns.zh: 好，现在回到主页面。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I am there. What is this blue button?
turns.zh: 我到了。这个蓝色按钮是什么？

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: That is for a list of all your works.
turns.zh: 那是查看所有任务的列表。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will give it a push.
turns.zh: 我点一下看看。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do you see all your works there?
turns.zh: 你看到所有任务了吗？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes, and I see the one I did.
turns.zh: 是的，而且我看到了已完成的那个。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Now mark that one as done.
turns.zh: 现在把那个标记为完成。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I push the button. It is not there.
turns.zh: 我按了按钮，它不见了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Good. You have your first work done.
turns.zh: 好，你完成了第一个任务。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That was quick. I like this place.
turns.zh: 真快，我喜欢这个软件。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: It is simple, is it not?
turns.zh: 很简单，对吧？

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Yes. I will put in more works for the week.
turns.zh: 对，我打算把这周的工作都加进去。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Do that. You will see them on the day list.
turns.zh: 加吧，你会在日历上看到它们。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will. Thanks for your help.
turns.zh: 好的，谢谢你的帮助。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: No trouble. Say if they say no.
turns.zh: 不客气。他们要是拦你，就说一声。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: I will. get some rest.
turns.zh: 我会的。休息。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Right. I will make a list for the week.
turns.zh: 好，我这就列个周计划。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good. Put the days and times.
turns.zh: 不错，把日期和时间填上。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Done. Five days a week, nine to five.
turns.zh: 搞定了，一周五天，朝九晚五。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is a full week. Do not work too hard.
turns.zh: 这一周排满了，别太累。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will take a rest at night.
turns.zh: 晚上我会休息的。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is clear now.
turns.zh: 现在清楚了。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: Yes. I can see all my work in one place.
turns.zh: 是的，所有工作一目了然。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: That is the idea. Keep it simple.
turns.zh: 就是这个意思，简单就好。

turns.speaker: A
turns.en: I will. rest up, and thank you again.
turns.zh: 我会的，好好休息，再次感谢。

turns.speaker: B
turns.en: Good night. Sleep well.
turns.zh: 晚安，睡个好觉。

storyBlurb: 甲在朋友乙的电话指导下下载了一个新软件，从注册到完成第一个任务，逐渐掌握基本操作。
storyScript:
【开场·获取应用】周三晚上，甲坐在书桌前，手机屏幕亮着。朋友乙在电话那头推荐了一款管理软件，说能帮他理清这周的工作安排。甲点开应用商店，搜索软件名，点击下载。进度条缓缓移动，他盯着屏幕，心里有些期待。下载完成，图标出现在桌面，他深吸一口气，点开它。

【进行·注册使用】软件打开，弹出注册页面。乙在电话里一步步指导：先输入邮箱，再设置密码。甲的手指在键盘上敲击，偶尔出错，乙耐心地重复。接着是填写昵称，甲想了想，输入自己的名字。页面跳转，出现几个基本按钮：新建任务、日历、设置。乙告诉他，先点新建任务，输入标题和截止日期。甲照做，屏幕上出现第一个任务条目。

【进行·熟练操作】甲开始尝试其他功能。乙让他点开日历，看看任务在日期上的分布。甲滑动屏幕，发现任务以彩色块显示，一目了然。乙又教他如何设置提醒，甲在任务详情页找到提醒选项，选择提前一天通知。他感到自己越来越熟练，手指在屏幕上滑动得流畅起来。

【收束·完成任务】甲回到主界面，看着刚才创建的任务，心里涌起一股成就感。乙说，现在试着完成一个简单任务。甲点开任务，标记为已完成，看到它被划掉，感到一阵轻松。他道谢挂断电话，盯着屏幕上的任务列表，知道这周的工作安排已经有了条理。窗外夜色深沉，甲关掉手机，嘴角带着微笑。
